Line 430:  
Line 431:  WriteLiteral(@"
Line 432:  </form>
Line 433:  
Line 434:  
Line 435:  <style>
Line 436:      .t-grid-content tr > td:hover .menu_block + .display_menu
Line 437:      {
Line 438:          display: block !important;
Line 439:      }
Line 440:  
Line 441:      .display_menu
Line 442:      {
Line 443:          left: 65px;
Line 444:          overflow: visible;
Line 445:          position: absolute;
Line 446:          top: -5px;
Line 447:          background: #fff;
Line 448:          border: 1px solid #ddd;
Line 449:          z-index: 100;
Line 450:      }
Line 451:  
Line 452:      .t-grid-content tr > td
Line 453:      {
Line 454:          overflow: visible !important;
Line 455:          position: relative;
Line 456:      }
Line 457:  
Line 458:      .display_menu > ul
Line 459:      {
Line 460:          padding: 0 16px;
Line 461:      }
Line 462:  
Line 463:      .display_menu li
Line 464:      {
Line 465:          list-style: none outside none;
Line 466:          width: 143px;
Line 467:      }
Line 468:  </style>
Line 469:  <script");
Line 470:  
Line 471:  EndContext("~/Views/Partner/ConfirmPartner.cshtml", 5091, 650, true);

Line 497:  WriteLiteral(" type=\"text/javascript\"");
Line 498:

Line 500:  
Line 501:  BeginContext("~/Views/Partner/ConfirmPartner.cshtml", 5869, 4371, true);
Line 502:  
Line 503:  WriteLiteral(">\r\n    $(function () {\r\n        jQuery.noConflict();\r\n    });\r\n\r\n    $(\"#btnconfi" +
Line 504:  "rm\").click(function () {\r\n        debugger;\r\n        var grid = $(\'#ConfirmPartn" +
Line 505:  "erGrid\').data(\'tGrid\');\r\n        var data = grid.data;\r\n    });\r\n\r\n    function " +
Line 506:  "CloseMe() {\r\n        $(\"#genericPopup\").dialog(\'close\');\r\n        //$(\".t-icon ." +
Line 507:  "t-refresh\").trigger(\'click\');\r\n\r\n        window.location.replace(window.location" +
Line 508:  ".href);\r\n    }\r\n\r\n      function SelectallFirstRadioButtons() {\r\n        // if c" +
Line 509:  "heck all is checked, all radio buttons  are selected\r\n          // if check all " +
Line 510:  "is unchecked, all radio buttons are cleared\r\n\r\n          if ($(\'#rbtnSelectAll1\'" +
Line 511:  ").is(\':checked\')) {\r\n              debugger;\r\n              $(\'input:radio[name$" +
Line 512:  "=rbtnSelect1]\').each(\r\n                function () {\r\n                    $(this" +
Line 513:  ").attr(\'checked\', \'checked\');\r\n                });\r\n              $(\'input:radio" +
Line 514:  "[name$=rbtnSelect2]\').each(\r\n                function () {\r\n                    " +
Line 515:  "debugger;\r\n                    $(this).removeAttr(\'checked\');\r\n                }" +
Line 516:  ");\r\n        }\r\n        else {\r\n              $(\'input:radio[name$=rbtnSelect1]\')" +
Line 517:  ".each(\r\n                function () {\r\n                    debugger;\r\n          " +
Line 518:  "          $(this).removeAttr(\'checked\');\r\n                });\r\n          }\r\n    " +
Line 519:  "  }\r\n\r\n      function SelectallSecondRadioButtons() {\r\n          // if check all" +
Line 520:  " is checked, all radio buttons  are selected\r\n          // if check all is unche" +
Line 521:  "cked, all radio buttons are cleared\r\n\r\n          if ($(\'#rbtnSelectAll2\').is(\':c" +
Line 522:  "hecked\')) {\r\n              debugger;\r\n              $(\'input:radio[name$=rbtnSel" +
Line 523:  "ect2]\').each(\r\n                function () {\r\n                    $(this).attr(\'" +
Line 524:  "checked\', \'checked\');\r\n                });\r\n              $(\'input:radio[name$=r" +
Line 525:  "btnSelect1]\').each(\r\n                function () {\r\n                    debugger" +
Line 526:  ";\r\n                    $(this).removeAttr(\'checked\');\r\n                });\r\n    " +
Line 527:  "      }\r\n          else {\r\n              $(\'input:radio[name$=rbtnSelect2]\').eac" +
Line 528:  "h(\r\n                function () {\r\n                    debugger;\r\n              " +
Line 529:  "      $(this).removeAttr(\'checked\');\r\n                });\r\n          }\r\n      }\r" +
Line 530:  "\n\r\n\r\n    //  $(\'input:radio[name$=rbtnSelect1]\').click(\r\n    //function () {\r\n  " +
Line 531:  "      \r\n    //    if (!$(this).is(\':checked\')) {\r\n    //        $(\'#checkedRecor" +
Line 532:  "ds1\').removeAttr(\'checked\');\r\n    //    }\r\n    //    else {\r\n    //        if ($" +
Line 533:  "(\'input:radio[name$=rbtnSelect1]\').length ==\r\n    //        $(\'input:radio[name$" +

Line 542:  "          // if check all is checked, all checkboxes are checked\r\n          // i" +
Line 543:  "f check all is unchecked, all checkboxes are cleared\r\n\r\n          if ($(\'#chkSel" +
Line 544:  "ectAll\').is(\':checked\')) {\r\n              $(\'input:checkbox[name$=chkSelect]\').e" +
Line 545:  "ach(\r\n                  function () {\r\n                      $(this).attr(\'check" +
Line 546:  "ed\', \'checked\');\r\n                  });\r\n          }\r\n          else {\r\n        " +
Line 547:  "      $(\'input:checkbox[name$=chkSelect]\').each(\r\n                  function () " +
Line 548:  "{\r\n                      $(this).removeAttr(\'checked\');\r\n                  });\r\n" +
Line 549:  "          }\r\n      }\r\n\r\n      $(\'input:checkbox[name$=chkSelect]\').click(\r\n     " +
Line 550:  " function () {\r\n          // if any of the checkbox is unchecked\r\n          // c" +
Line 551:  "heck all checkbox should be cleared\r\n          if (!$(this).is(\':checked\')) {\r\n " +
Line 552:  "             $(\'#chkSelectAll\').removeAttr(\'checked\');\r\n          }\r\n          e" +
Line 553:  "lse {\r\n              // if all of the checkbox is checked\r\n              // chec" +
Line 554:  "k all checkbox should be checked\r\n              if ($(\'input:checkbox[name$=chkS" +
Line 555:  "elect]\').length ==\r\n              $(\'input:checkbox[name$=chkSelect]:checked\').l" +
Line 556:  "ength) {\r\n                  $(\'#chkSelectAll\').attr(\'checked\', \'checked\');\r\n    " +
Line 557:  "          }\r\n          }\r\n      });\r\n</script>\r\n\r\n");
